---
title: "36-315: Statistical Graphics and Visualization"
---

Welcome to 36-315, Summer 2026.

This is a 6-week summer course on Statistical Graphics and Visualization.

On this site, the [Lectures](lectures.qmd) tab contains all lecture slides.

All assignments are posted on [Canvas](https://canvas.cmu.edu) and submitted through [Gradescope](https://www.gradescope.com).
